free_text: Validation of the intra-nuclear cascade evaporation
measurements and 2.3m flight path for 23 degree
measurements. See Cierjacks et al., 82ANTWER, p.383
Proton monitor involved a thin graphite scatterer
placed in proton beam far upstream of neutron
producing target, and forward scattered protons at 30
degree were detected by a plastic scintillator
Neutron energy resolution ranged between 1.8 and 33.8%
for neutrons in the energy range 1 to 500 MeV.
updates, converted to lower and upper case.
